overall.description: Cinematic cutscene from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing three Ultramarines in blue power armor with gold trim walking through a dimly lit industrial spaceship corridor. The central squad leader exits right, followed by the rightmost marine, leaving the leftmost marine to continue walking alone through the misty metallic corridor.

agents.ego_description: central Space Marine in blue power armor walking forward at the head of the three-man squad

notable_agents.action: Space Marine walking forward holding a bolter rifle
Space Marine walking in formation alongside the leader

entered.detail: dark metallic wall with exposed pipes and industrial paneling
dark metallic wall with conduit and structural beams
metal grate flooring with industrial texture
exposed pipes and conduits running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Three Space Marines in blue Ultramarines power armor walk toward the camera through a dimly lit industrial corridor. The central marine leads the formation while the other two flank him, all moving with heavy deliberate steps across the metal grating floor.

events.description: central Space Marine turns right and begins exiting the frame to the right
right Space Marine follows the leader and exits the frame to the right

agents.ego_description: central Space Marine turns right and walks out of the frame, followed by the rightmost marine leaving the left marine alone

notable_agents.action: left Space Marine continues walking forward as the other two exit right

segments.scene_description: The central squad leader veers right and exits the frame, followed by the rightmost marine. The camera pans slightly to maintain focus on the remaining left marine as he continues walking alone through the corridor.

agents.ego_description: remaining Space Marine continues walking forward alone through the misty corridor

entered.detail: deeper section of the industrial corridor visible ahead with atmospheric fog

segments.scene_description: The final Space Marine continues walking alone through the industrial corridor. The camera focuses on him as he moves through the atmospheric lighting, with the corridor walls now closer and the distant section of the ship visible ahead through the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial corridor as a squad of Space Marines gradually thins until only one warrior remains. It begins with three Ultramarines in blue power armor advancing toward the camera with heavy, deliberate steps across a metal grating floor. As the formation breaks, the central squad leader veers right and exits the frame, followed closely by the rightmost marine. The camera then pans slightly to maintain focus on the remaining soldier, who continues his solitary march through the atmospheric lighting. The scene finally narrows as the corridor walls seem to close in, leaving the lone marine to disappear into the mist toward a distant section of the ship.
